scripts.migrate:todos-shards: npm run build && node -r dotenv/config dist/scripts/migrateTodosShards.js
scripts.migrate:todos-v2-backfill: npm run build && node -r dotenv/config dist/scripts/backfillTodosToV2.js
scripts.check:todos-drift: npm run build && node -r dotenv/config dist/scripts/checkTodosDataDrift.js
scripts.canary:todos-storage: npm run build && node -r dotenv/config dist/scripts/runTodosStorageCanary.js
scripts.migrate:strip-encryption: npm run build && node -r dotenv/config dist/scripts/migrateStripEncryption.js
scripts.cleanup:orphan-attachments: npm run build && node -r dotenv/config dist/scripts/cleanupOrphanAttachments.js
